text: [{"choices": [{"finish_reason": "stop", "index": 0, "logprobs": null, "message": {"annotations": null, "audio": null, "content": "[{\"bbox\": [260, 117, 2638, 583], \"category\": \"Title\", \"text\": \"RELATIONE\\nDELLA MORTE\"}, {\"bbox\": [254, 654, 2629, 1125], \"category\": \"Text\", \"text\": \"Che ha patito in Algieri il Padre Francelco Ci-\\nrano Sardo della Città di Salsari, frate\\nConuentuale dell'Ordine di\\nSan Francelco.\"}, {\"bbox\": [237, 1331, 2629, 1617], \"category\": \"Text\", \"text\": \"TRADOTTA DA SPAGNOLO\\nDal Dottor Antioco Strada Sardo Calaritano.\"}, {\"bbox\": [794, 1605, 2772, 3148], \"category\": \"Picture\"}, {\"bbox\": [854, 3225, 1975, 3348], \"category\": \"Text\", \"text\": \"IN TVRINO\"}, {\"bbox\": [226, 3356, 2588, 3597], \"category\": \"Text\", \"text\": \"Stampata in Barcellona, & ristampata in Turino, per\\ngli Heredi di Antonio Bianchi.\"}, {\"bbox\": [1067, 3597, 1764, 3694], \"category\": \"Text\", \"text\": \"M D C V .\"}, {\"bbox\": [754, 3764, 2030, 3880], \"category\": \"Text\", \"text\": \"Con Licenza de' Superiori.\"}]", "function_call": null, "reasoning": null, "refusal": null, "role": "assistant", "tool_calls": []}, "stop_reason": 151673, "token_ids": null}], "created": 1775515392, "id": "chatcmpl-bb49b77677d6f1a1", "kv_transfer_params": null, "model": "davanstrien/dots.ocr-1.5", "object": "chat.completion", "prompt_logprobs": null, "prompt_token_ids": null, "service_tier": null, "system_fingerprint": null, "usage": {"completion_tokens": 415, "prompt_tokens": 14473, "prompt_tokens_details": null, "total_tokens": 14888}}]
